topic_focus: Prompt structural efficiency with XML tags

core_narrative_arc.hook_angle: Is your LLM's attention being wasted on JSON syntax?
body_points: JSON syntax overloads the self-attention mechanism.
XML tags create clean, localized attentional bounding boxes.
Refactoring to XML reduces output variance and hallucinations.
Save token costs and lower KV cache entropy.
core_narrative_arc.call_to_action: Refactor one unstructured prompt to self-closing XML tags today.

visual_direction_notes: Cinematic tech-minimalist aesthetic. High-contrast dark mode IDE with glowing emerald XML tags contrasting against dim amber JSON brackets. Fluid, macro camera pans showing mathematical equations transforming into clean, bounded code blocks. Warm accent lighting in a clean workspace environment.

topic_focus: Starship Flight 12 structural upgrades and telemetry innovations

core_narrative_arc.hook_angle: SpaceX just changed orbital turnarounds forever with Flight 12.
body_points: Starship V3 launched with Raptor 3 engines and record-shattering payload.
Booster 19 missed catch, crashing at 1,450 km/h.
Ship 39 performed perfect splashdown in Indian Ocean.
Camera-equipped satellites inspected the thermal shield in real-time.
core_narrative_arc.call_to_action: Watch Scott Manley's full Flight 12 breakdown to see the telemetry data in action.

source_references: Starship Flight 12 Starship V3 (Block 3) test flight

visual_direction_notes: Hyper-realistic, high-fidelity aerospace aesthetic. Cool blue and fiery copper color palette. Dramatic slow-motion shots of Starship V3 launching from OLP-2, shifting to a satellite perspective in space capturing a glowing plasma re-entry. Dynamic telemetry overlay graphs flickering on screen to show structural load.

topic_focus: Zero-trust security and statelessness in Model Context Protocol

core_narrative_arc.hook_angle: Your local AI agents might be opening a backdoor to your computer.
body_points: MCP stateless spec simplifies scaling but exposes tool vulnerabilities.
CVE-2026-27825 allows unauthenticated remote code execution via path traversal.
Localhost servers risk DNS rebinding attacks using Go MCP SDK.
Treat local MCP servers as untrusted third-party entities.
core_narrative_arc.call_to_action: Audit your Cursor and Windsurf MCP endpoints and enforce zero-trust controls.

source_references: MCP Deep Dive: the Great, the Broken, and the Downright Dangerous

visual_direction_notes: Edgy, cyber-security neon aesthetic. Cyberpunk-inspired terminal with electric violet and deep crimson tones. Glitch transitions and scrolling vulnerability scanner outputs. Moody, dark studio setting with soft backlighting on a multi-monitor desk setup showcasing data packet flows.
